# CVision

> [CVision](https://www.cvisionapp.com) is an AI-powered CV and resume analyzer and ATS checker. Upload a CV to get an instant ATS compatibility score, keyword-gap analysis, section-by-section feedback, AI rewrite suggestions, and matching career paths. It also matches a CV against a specific job description and generates tailored cover letters. Fully online and self-serve, available worldwide. Founded by Fatih Çatalçam.

## Product

- [Home](https://www.cvisionapp.com) — what CVision does, how it works, and FAQ.
- [Try it free (no signup)](https://www.cvisionapp.com/try) — upload a CV and get an ATS score plus one improvement suggestion without creating an account.
- [Pricing](https://www.cvisionapp.com/pricing) — Free and Pro plans.
- [About](https://www.cvisionapp.com/about) — the product and the founder.
- [How ATS works](https://www.cvisionapp.com/how-ats-works) — guide to how Applicant Tracking Systems read, parse, and rank resumes, what an ATS score measures, and how to pass automated screening.

## Services and pricing

- Free plan — $0/month: 3 CV analyses per week, ATS compatibility score, keyword analysis, career-path suggestions.
- Pro plan — ₺199.99/month (billed via [Lemon Squeezy](https://www.lemonsqueezy.com) as merchant of record): 50 CV analyses per week, the full AI suggestion pack (all unlocked), AI bullet-point rewriting, the full AI summary and analysis report, and priority support. Includes a 7-day free trial; no credit card required to start.
- Job-description (JD) matching: compare a CV against a specific job posting for a match score and keyword gap analysis.
- AI cover-letter generation: generate a tailored cover letter from a CV and a job description (Pro).

## Key facts

- AI analysis powered by large language models (OpenAI GPT).
- Accepts PDF and TXT resume uploads, up to 5MB.
- ATS compatibility scoring plus sub-scores for keywords, completeness, and experience.
- Interface languages: English, Turkish, Spanish, German, and French.
- Works in every country; nothing to install, everything runs in the browser.

## Contact

- Website: [cvisionapp.com](https://www.cvisionapp.com)
- Support email: [fthctlcm@outlook.com](mailto:fthctlcm@outlook.com)
- Availability: online 24/7, self-serve. Support replies during business hours.
- Operated from Turkey, serving customers globally.
